Off Calendar Aug-20-2025 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-14-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-01-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-11-2025 Continued To Apr-01-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-25-2025 Continued To Mar-11-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John Mangini for Patrick Corkery, Executor (via Zoom).

The Court noted that the original deadline for closure of the estate was June 2024, and inquired about the delay. Mr. Mangini reported that the inventory and appraisal had just been completed and received from the probate referee over the weekend. He stated that the inventory and appraisal will be filed today or tomorrow. Additionally, a status report is being prepared, and he expects to meet with the client later this week for final review and signature. The report is anticipated to be filed by the end of this week or early next week. Mr. Mangini further stated that he anticipates filing the accounting and petition for final distribution sometime in April.

The court continued the matter to March 11, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-28-2025 Continued To Feb-25-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Sep-11-2014 is admitted to probate. Patrick Corkery is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jan-28-2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Svahlin. Not Reported.
